'''Hobyo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinian]] serving the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] when he was captured during the failed [[Second Battle of Bilbringi|Operation Trinity]]. Infiltrating the [[Peace Brigade]] and sabotaging their engines in the attempt to rescue [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] being sent to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to be sacrificed, he was captured.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
